heading: Choose Your Path
subheading: Three tiers built for where you are and where you want to go. Every path leads to the same mountain. Pick the pace that suits you.

tiers.name: Pup
tiers.desc: Curious newcomers testing the terrain. Dip in, explore the movements, and see if the Hyrax way clicks.

tiers.name: Rock Runner
tiers.desc: Self-starters who want structure and accountability. You know you'll show up and be ready to train.

tiers.name: Iron Dassie
tiers.desc: No half measures. Expert guidance, peak nutrition, and a system fully customized around your life.

compareSubheading: A closer look at what each tier includes so you can pick the right fit.

items.name: Workout Video Library
items.detail: Access to Hyrax workout videos covering all five modules with scaling options for every fitness level. Pup members get a curated starter selection.

items.name: Downloadable PDF Guides
items.detail: Printable workout sheets, equipment checklists, and session planners you can take to the gym or the trail.

items.name: Movement Tutorials
items.detail: Step-by-step breakdowns for every Hyrax movement pattern. Learn proper form for carries, crawls, bolts, and scrambles.

items.name: Community Access
items.detail: Join the Hyrax community to share progress, ask questions, and connect with other athletes training the same system.

items.name: Customized Workout Routines
items.detail: Training plans built around your intake assessment. Workouts are tailored to your fitness level, equipment access, and weekly schedule.

items.name: Customized Diet Plans
items.detail: Nutrition guidance matched to your training load and goals. Covers meal timing, macros, and practical food choices that support performance.

items.name: Benchmark Tracking
items.detail: Log your Outcrop Challenge scores, carry loads, and session times. See exactly where you stand and how far you have come.

items.name: Progress Analytics
items.detail: Charts and insights that break down your improvement over weeks and months. Spot trends, plateaus, and breakthroughs at a glance.

items.name: Digital Personal Trainer
items.detail: An adaptive coaching system that adjusts your program week to week based on your performance, recovery, and feedback.

items.name: Priority Support
items.detail: Fast-track access to help with your training, form questions, and program adjustments. Get answers when you need them.

eventsSubheading: Bring the Hyrax system to your community with branded events and competitions.
eventsBody: Whether you run a gym, coach a team, or organize community fitness days, you can bring the Hyrax experience to your crew. We provide the programming, branding, and support so you can focus on your athletes.
eventsList: Ready-to-run event formats for groups of any size
Official Hyrax branding and promotional materials
Scalable workouts for mixed fitness levels
eventsNote: Interested in hosting or want to find an event near you? Reach out and we will help you get started.
